response: The prefix given to the end of the name to avoid confusion for the winner of the 1996 Record of the Year Grammy is **"inoculation"**. This is derived from the context provided, where it is stated that "inoculation" is now more or less synonymous in nontechnical usage with "injection" etc., and the question "Have you had your flu injection/vaccination/inoculation/immunization?" should not cause confusion. The winner of the 1996 Record of the Year Grammy is Seal, and the context indicates that he was referred to as "inoculation" to avoid confusion with "vaccination" or "immunization."
